{
  "judge_id": "J-12345",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent output walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.6": "The agent output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, and improved flow.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., 'absolute cost figures should be read as relative rather than deployment-grade projections').",
    "RX.3": "The agent output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d) without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The agent output is harm-free and does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "The agent output blends sources without traceability (e.g., no annotations for non-cosmetic changes)."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.98,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent output walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.6: The agent output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, and improved flow.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., 'absolute cost figures should be read as relative rather than deployment-grade projections').
rationale.RX.3: The agent output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d) without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output is harm-free and does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The agent output blends sources without traceability (e.g., no annotations for non-cosmetic changes).
